education.institution: Birla Institute of Technology and Science (BITS), Pilani
education.degree: M.Tech in Data Science and Engineering

dissertation.title: Explainable AI for Predicting Malware Infection
dissertation.summary: Developed an interpretable ML pipeline on the Microsoft Malware dataset (8.9M devices) with GDPR-compatible explainability for cybersecurity applications.
bullets: Trained ML model achieving ~66.7% accuracy and ~66.4% recall, aiding proactive mitigation of data breaches and financial risks.
Applied EBM, SHAP, LIME for interpretability, producing local + global explanations with uncertainty for regulatory + trust alignment (GDPR-compatible design).
Engineered features from 4.1GB (83-field) dataset, optimizing memory usage by ~50% via columnar transformations in Pandas/Polars.

education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering

certifications.title: Acknowledged Contributor — The Hundred-Page Language Models Book

awards.title: Best Team Award (2x), On-the-Spot Award (5x), Special Initiative Award
